metadata.description: Reusable operative exposure, positioning, safety, and closure backbone for orthopaedic surgery.
Generic criteria for selecting an operative exposure independent of implant system.
Principles governing safe operative positioning for exposure, imaging, and bailout.

metadata.description: Sterile preparation and draping of operative regions with imaging access preserved.
Planning of fluoroscopic trajectories, sterile entry, and monitor placement before incision.

Planning incision length, orientation, prior scars, and extensile continuity.
Reusable concept of dissection between nerve territories to reduce denervation risk.

metadata.description: Canonical catalog concept for nerves and vessels endangered by a given approach.

Staged progression from limited to extensile or alternate windows when exposure is inadequate.
Anatomic safe corridors for implants, pins, and dissection relative to neurovascular structures.
How operative approach selection links to characteristic failure modes and complications.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Surgical approaches form a reusable operative exposure backbone that links positioning, landmarks, intervals, protection, extensile options, bailout, and closure across specialties.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Approach selection is driven by the required target, soft-tissue condition, prior incisions, imaging needs, and defined extensile or bailout pathways—not implant brand preference.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Positioning must permit the planned exposure, fluoroscopy, anesthesia access, and a safe extensile or bailout option before prep and drape.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: C-arm trajectory, sterile entry path, and monitor position should be verified before incision so imaging is not obstructed by drapes or equipment.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Surface landmarks define incision placement and must be confirmed after positioning because landmarks shift with limb rotation and traction.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Skin incision planning accounts for prior scars, extensile continuity, soft-tissue envelopes, and anticipated implant or reduction needs.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Internervous planes reduce denervation risk and should be recorded as reusable anatomy objects independent of any single named approach.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Intermuscular planes define standard intervals and must be distinguished from improvised muscle-splitting paths.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Deep intervals complete exposure after the superficial plane and often determine whether the target is safely reached.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Every named approach has exposure limits; exceeding them without a defined extensile pathway increases neurovascular and soft-tissue risk.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Structures requiring protection are identified before incision and rechecked during retraction, instrumentation, and closure.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Neurovascular structures at risk are approach-defining safety objects; loss of identification is a stop signal.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Extensile options are planned independently of the standard exposure so extension follows a defined pathway rather than ad hoc dissection.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Bailout strategies—alternate windows, staged exposure, or change of approach—are selected before incision when risk is high.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Closure restores released layers without entrapping protected structures and accounts for swelling, drains, and postoperative restrictions.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Postoperative approach considerations include wound surveillance, motion or weight-bearing limits linked to the exposure, and approach-specific complication watch-outs.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Revision exposure reuses prior incisions when safe, but may require alternate windows when soft-tissue or neurovascular risk is elevated.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: If exposure is inadequate, escalate along defined extensile or bailout pathways rather than forcing the original window.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Safe zones constrain implant and instrument trajectories relative to known neurovascular anatomy and should be treated as first-class operative objects.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Approach-specific complications are linked to the exposure pathway and inform selection, counseling, and intraoperative protection priorities.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: The deltopectoral approach uses the deltopectoral interval and prioritizes axillary nerve and cephalic vein protection.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: The volar Henry approach follows the Henry interval with continuous protection of the radial artery and median nerve territories.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Kocher-Langenbeck exposure prioritizes sciatic nerve protection and medial femoral circumflex preservation for femoral head blood supply.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Direct anterior hip exposure uses the Smith-Petersen interval and requires attention to the lateral femoral cutaneous nerve and proximal femoral anatomy.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: The medial parapatellar approach provides extensile knee exposure while protecting the extensor mechanism and planning for staged extension if needed.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Posterior spine approaches require continuous orientation to the cord and nerve roots; unintended durotomy or neural injury is a stop-and-repair event.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Lateral lumbar approaches traverse the psoas corridor and require neuromonitoring attention to plexus risk.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection claims require human review

metadata.claim_text: Positioning objects are shared; do not mint approach-specific duplicate positioning identities for the same standard position.

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Procedure requires operative exposure and multiple approaches are plausible
metadata.action: Select the approach whose safe window reaches the target while accounting for soft tissue, prior incisions, imaging, and extensile/bailout needs

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Positioning does not permit safe imaging, anesthesia access, or bailout exposure
metadata.action: Reposition and verify all required access before preparation and incision

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Required fluoroscopic views cannot be obtained after positioning
metadata.action: Adjust table, C-arm, or patient position before prep rather than accepting inadequate imaging

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Surface landmarks are distorted by swelling, deformity, or obesity
metadata.action: Confirm landmarks with imaging and extensile incision planning before committing the skin cut

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: A protected neurovascular structure cannot be identified or safely mobilized
metadata.action: Stop blind progression, restore landmarks, extend along a defined pathway, or change approach

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: The planned internervous or intermuscular interval is not clearly identified
metadata.action: Re-establish landmarks and interval identity before deep dissection

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Target anatomy cannot be reached within the approach exposure limits
metadata.action: Invoke the predefined extensile option or bailout strategy rather than improvising

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Additional exposure is required beyond the standard window
metadata.action: Extend only along the defined extensile pathway while rechecking protected structures

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: The planned approach is unsafe or inadequate despite defined extension
metadata.action: Execute the preplanned bailout: alternate window, staged exposure, or change of approach

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Prior incisions, implants, or scarring alter standard intervals
metadata.action: Choose re-entry versus alternate window with attending-level plan for neurovascular protection

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Swelling, tissue viability, or tension makes layered primary closure unsafe
metadata.action: Use defined bailout soft-tissue strategy and postoperative protection plan

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Anterior shoulder or proximal humerus exposure is required
metadata.action: Use deltopectoral interval with axillary nerve protection and planned extensile option

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Posterior acetabular column or wall exposure is required
metadata.action: Use KL pathway with sciatic protection and MFCA-aware dissection; escalate if visualization is inadequate

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Anterior hip arthroplasty or anterior hip exposure is planned
metadata.action: Confirm table/positioning strategy and LFCN/femoral nerve protection before incision

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Neural elements are not clearly visualized or protected during lumbar exposure
metadata.action: Stop, reorient, improve exposure, and protect cord/roots before continuing instrumentation

proposals.evidence_summary: Surgical Approaches manufacture; approach-selection and at-risk anatomy decisions require attending review

metadata.trigger: Popliteal neurovascular structures are not controlled during posterior knee exposure
metadata.action: Stop deep progression until popliteal vessels and nerves are identified and protected
